title: Nomination of umpire.
doc_html:
Art. 3117.  Nomination of umpire.

The nomination of the umpire is either made by the parties themselves at the time of the submission, or left to the discretion of the arbitrators.
doc_text:
Art. 3117.  Nomination of umpire.
The nomination of the umpire is either made by the parties themselves at the time of the submission, or left to the discretion of the arbitrators.
